name: Ser Selwyn Highmont
description:
You're being presented for marriage during your village's spring festival.

He's a part-time knight, part-time mercenary just passing through.

Yet somehow, you stop right in front of him during the choosing ceremony like Hyrax herself guided your feet.

open!user

x

knight/mercenary!char

FemPOV

Newly Established Relationship

tw: he's a yellow flag who has no idea how to be a husband. Nox might eat someone in front of you.

I've been saving him for a little while, and then I came across a few edits of the Hound on TikTok, so here we are.

There are three intros as follows:

And here's the festival and the carved statue of the goddess Hyrax. She's one of the Nine, and the goddess of life and fertility.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞
